identity.name: VidTrack
identity.description: A high-performance analytics dashboard for content creator agencies.

colors.notes: Use Zinc-950 (#09090b) as the base. Primary CTAs should be White (#fafafa) with Black text for maximum contrast. Use Indigo-500 (#6366f1) strictly for active states, branding elements, and data visualization, NOT for main buttons.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 shadow-sm font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-indigo-500/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is at least Zinc-400 (#a1a1aa) or lighter.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible Indigo-500 ring on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORT FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
THEME SETUP: Ensure 'dark' class is always applied to the html/body tag (force dark mode).
LAYOUT: Use a sidebar layout for the authenticated area (Dashboard). Use a centered, clean layout for Auth pages with the abstract background image.
COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components in 'components/ui' to match the 'The Performance Pro' aesthetic (Zinc-900 backgrounds, Zinc-800 borders).
ICONS: Use Lucide-React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for a refined look.
Universal Guidelines: Follow the UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT provided in the persona instructions.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
